evidence_received: Example reply cites a source record and a performance target.
missing_evidence: Role-approved public wording and public-claim basis remain missing.
next_action: Ask a narrower follow-up for the missing item.
use_rule: Track response status and remaining evidence gaps; do not claim TAXLANE found fraud, waste, abuse, legal dedication of income taxes, poor performance, or proven reform benefits.
